intellect_insights.title: Budget Overspend Without Proportional Leads
intellect_insights.observation: Spend pacing at 279% but leads only at 146% — diminishing returns
intellect_insights.recommendation: Reduce budgets on campaigns with CPL > 1.4x target. Reallocate to efficient performers.

intellect_insights.title: CPL Exceeds Alert Threshold — Check Day-Parting
intellect_insights.recommendation: Pull hourly/day-of-week report from Google Ads UI. Reduce bids or pause ad schedule during high-CPL hours (typically weekends for B2B).

intellect_insights.title: DG Conversion Rate Critically Low
intellect_insights.observation: DG CVR 0.4% is less than half of Search CVR 6.1%
intellect_insights.recommendation: Audit DG landing pages. Consider DG-specific landing pages with softer CTAs (webinar, guide) vs hard lead form.

intellect_insights.title: Majority of Ad Groups Under-Bidding
intellect_insights.observation: 5 of 5 ad groups can increase bids — room for more impression share
intellect_insights.recommendation: Increase bids to recommended Max CPC. This should improve IS% and capture more converting queries.

recommendations.detail: QS spread of 3 (min 7, max 10) across 6 keywords. Low-QS keywords drag down ad rank and inflate CPC for the entire ad group.

recommendations.execution_note: Requires manual keyword migration and new ad copy creation
